pi_items.source: Found in task.json, setup_task.sh (where it is cleaned), and export_result.sh (where it is checked for size and modification time).
Found in setup_task.sh where it is directly created and populated with garden-path sentences.
Found in verifier.py where 'len(routines) >= 5' is explicitly checked to award points.
export_result.sh parses the .psyexp XML and checks for Code, Text, Keyboard in Routines and Loop (which includes LoopInitiator) in Flow.

privileged_info_summary: The experiment output must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/self_paced_reading.psyexp. The conditions file is located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/spr_sentences.csv and contains classic psycholinguistics stimuli. The experiment must use at least 5 routines (including instructions, reading, question, feedback) and implement the word-by-word reading logic using Code, Text, Keyboard, and LoopInitiator components.
